extraction.one_line_summary: STORER Michael won from 31-rider breakaway that averaged 31mph early; ROGLIC crashed descending after attacking the category 2 climb, losing red jersey to breakaway rider IKING.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma deliberately let 9-second deficit rider IKING into 31-rider break, surrendering jersey before harder stages 11-12 ahead.
ROGLIC attacked category 2 climb despite holding red jersey, unprecedented aggression that backfired via descent crash and jersey loss.
TRENTINE attacked breakaway 24 miles out before category 2 climb, burning matches too early when gap already inflating past 13 minutes.
Ineos riders BERNAL and YATES dropped on category 2 despite moderate difficulty, catastrophic morale collapse with both losing GC time.

rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: Won solo from breakaway after being strongest on category 2 climb and proved exceptional descending skills.
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: Unnecessary aggression attacking category 2 while in red jersey suggests overconfidence; crash on descent cost jersey but bike damage could've been catastrophic.
rider_signals.IKING Odd Christian: positive: Gained red jersey via breakaway 9 seconds behind at start; Jumbo-Visma intentionally allowed gap, revealing strategic weakness.
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Dropped on moderate category 2 climb alongside YATES, exposing severe form crisis and team morale collapse at Ineos.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Getting dropped on non-selective stage alongside BERNAL indicates fundamental inability to follow wheels on medium-difficulty climbs.
rider_signals.SEPCOOS Koen: positive: Led tempo work for ROGLIC group after crash, showing exceptional domestique performance throughout stage.
